description: Small labeled wallet dataset for ingestion + (Week 4) scoring validation. Labels are NOT ground truth; see label_basis on each entry.

label_legend.likely_human: Behaves like a real, individual human operator.
label_legend.likely_sybil: Behaves like a bot / airdrop-farming / Sybil wallet.

label_basis_legend.public_identity: Well-known public address; the human label is widely documented.
label_basis_legend.illustrative_synthetic: Placeholder address chosen to illustrate a pattern. NOT a real accusation; to be replaced with a verified labeled set (e.g. a public airdrop Sybil post-mortem) before Week 4 scoring validation.

wallets.label: likely_human
wallets.reason: vitalik.eth — many years of activity, ENS identity, highly diverse counterparties and contract interactions; a clear individual human operator.

wallets.label: likely_human
wallets.reason: A second well-known Vitalik Buterin address — long, organic, multi-year history.

wallets.label: likely_sybil
wallets.reason: Burn/sink address — not a human operator. Used as a clear non-human negative example.

wallets.label: likely_sybil
wallets.reason: Illustrative freshly-created burst wallet: short lifespan, single funding source, repetitive low-value txs to qualify for an airdrop. Placeholder — replace with a verified Sybil address before scoring validation.

wallets.label: likely_sybil
wallets.reason: Illustrative airdrop-farming wallet in a cluster funded from one parent, low counterparty diversity. Placeholder — replace with a verified Sybil address before scoring validation.
